mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.member_id, m.nickname AS member_nickname, c.title, c.organizer, c.category, c.region, c.description, c.cover_image, c.entry_start, c.entry_end, c.result_date, c.prize_info, c.price, c.status, c.entry_count, c.view_count, c.created_datetime FROM tbl_contest c LEFT JOIN tbl_member m ON c.member_id = m.id WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT ce.id, ce.contest_id, ce.work_id, w.title AS work_title, (SELECT wf.file_url FROM tbl_work_file wf WHERE wf.work_id = w.id ORDER BY wf.sort_order LIMIT 1) AS work_thumbnail, ce.member_id, m.nickname AS member_nickname, ce.award_rank, ce.submitted_at FROM tbl_contest_entry ce LEFT JOIN tbl_work w ON ce.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN tbl_member m ON ce.member_id = m.id WHERE ce.contest_id = #{contestId} ORDER BY ce.submitted_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_contest ( member_id, title, organizer, category, region, description, cover_image, entry_start, entry_end, result_date, prize_info, price, status ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{contest.title}, #{contest.organizer}, #{contest.category}, #{contest.region}, #{contest.description}, #{contest.coverImage}, #{contest.entryStart}, #{contest.entryEnd}, #{contest.resultDate}, #{contest.prizeInfo}, #{contest.price}, 'UPCOMING' )
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.title, c.organizer, c.category, c.cover_image, c.entry_end, c.status, c.entry_count, c.created_datetime, CASE WHEN c.entry_end < CURRENT_DATE THEN '마감' WHEN c.entry_end = CURRENT_DATE THEN 'D-Day' ELSE 'D-' || (c.entry_end - CURRENT_DATE) END AS d_day FROM tbl_contest c WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId} AND c.deleted_datetime IS NULL ORDER BY c.created_datetime DESC

SELECT c.id, c.title, c.organizer, c.category, c.cover_image, c.entry_end, c.status, c.entry_count, c.created_datetime, CASE WHEN c.entry_end < CURRENT_DATE THEN '마감' WHEN c.entry_end = CURRENT_DATE THEN 'D-Day' ELSE 'D-' || (c.entry_end - CURRENT_DATE) END AS d_day FROM tbl_contest_entry ce JOIN tbl_contest c ON ce.contest_id = c.id WHERE ce.member_id = #{memberId} AND c.deleted_datetime IS NULL ORDER BY ce.submitted_at DESC
